message:
feat(abi): nativize 15 more GCT symbols — DNS validators, rresvport, rcmd_errstr, key_LOCAL

Promote 15 GlibcCallThrough symbols to native Implemented:
- res_hnok/dnok/mailok/ownok + __res_ variants (9): RFC 952/1035 DNS name validation
- __res_randomid: LCG-based 16-bit DNS query ID generator
- rresvport/rresvport_af: reserved port binding (512-1023, AF_INET/INET6)
- __rcmd_errstr: thread-local rcmd error string pointer
- __key_*_LOCAL (3): already native AtomicPtr statics in rpc_abi.rs, matrix fixed

Milestone: Implemented crosses 2000 (2003)
GCT: 404→389, Implemented: 1988→2003

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
